jobPostingInfo.title: MR Software Intern
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Job Title

MR Software Intern

Job Description

Your role:

  • You will deeply be involved in the MR Suzhou software team engineering activities and assist the Suzhou MR software project leader in doing:
  • Unofficial software configuration management and testing.
  • Routine software documentation is offline maintenance.
  • Software stuff management.
  • You will work with MR Suzhou software team for the software programs to support medical device NMPA submission and software lifecycle management in healthcare.
  • You can acquire knowledge and skills in medical device product development and project management realms.
  • You have more experience working with the software product development team in MR domain and how Philips impacts with care for the patient, people and the planet.

You're the right fit if:

  • Majored in software or computer science related
  • Fluent English in both written and oral
  • Can attend internship 3-5 days for at least 3 month
